name: SV Meteorites
description: SV Meteorites public inventory with individual specimen detail pages and images.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser follows public inventory/detail pages, requires individual specimen fields, and rejects category/non-listing rows.

name: Meteorlab
description: New England Meteoritical Services static catalog pages for larger specimens and micromounts.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser reads old static catalog tables, captures specimen images, skips sold markers, and supports email-for-price rows.

name: BAITYLIA
description: BAITYLIA / Meteorite and More categorized inventory with individual specimen pages.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser follows categorized inventory rows to detail pages and rejects header/category rows.

name: Meteorite Exchange
description: WooCommerce meteorite dealer catalog with category pages and .html product detail pages.
notes: Strict WooCommerce parser is present and requires product detail pages, price, weight, availability, and non-specimen filtering. Disabled until sample output is validated across categories and add-to-cart/filter noise.

name: FossilEra
description: Large FossilEra active-only meteorite category with specimen cards, prices, images, and detail pages.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Source-specific parser uses active-only /meteorites/ detail pages, schema/meta/detail text, pagination, and sold-card suppression.

name: Galactic Stone & Ironworks
description: BigCommerce storefront with meteorite product grids, rel=next pagination, and card pricing.
notes: Parser requires detail-page product proof and an individual weight. Disabled because categories mix micromounts, collections, jewelry, memorabilia, and out-of-stock cards.

name: The Meteorite Market
description: Old static meteorite photo catalog with allowlisted sales pages and table-based specimens.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Static allowlist parser dedupes repeated item cells and rejects sold prices from validated sale pages.

name: Arizona Skies Meteorites
description: Mixed static meteorite, fossil, jewelry, and collectible site requiring narrow meteorite allowlists.
notes: Strict static parser follows only Lunar/Martian final pages and inexpensive meteorite rows with price plus individual weight. Disabled pending broader validation and respectful crawl-delay review.

name: Aerolite Meteorites
description: Specialist WooCommerce meteorite dealer with narrow shop categories and individual product pages.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser uses browser-like headers, narrow shop categories, schema/meta prices, and excludes sold, jewelry, books, stands, equipment, and other non-specimens.

name: IMPACTIKA
description: Long-running specialist source with Woo Store API products whose descriptions can contain individual sale rows.
notes: Parser emits price/weight rows from product short descriptions and skips sold rows and books/prints. Disabled until row parsing is validated across historical inventory pages.

name: SkyFall Meteorites
description: Specialist meteorite seller with Woo product sitemap and meteorites-for-sale detail paths.
notes: Parser only accepts /meteorites-for-sale/ product pages with positive title weights and prices; rejects NFS, 0g, read-more, jewelry, books, and category failures. Disabled until output is validated.

name: Meteolovers
description: IMCA-certified Woo/Elementor shop for meteorites, tektites, and related collectibles.
notes: Enabled after independent validation. Parser follows Elementor/Woo product cards under meteorite paths, uses schema/meta prices, and verifies sold/status/category coverage.

name: justMETEORITES
description: Authentic meteorite and impactite dealer with Woo product pages and visible stock markers.
notes: Parser uses the product sitemap, rejects /c/sold/ and out-of-stock/sold detail pages, and relies on schema prices. Disabled because site price freshness still needs verification.

name: Collector Secret Meteorites
description: Meteorite page appears to be an eBay affiliate/aggregator rather than direct verified inventory.
notes: Policy-blocked: do not scrape broad eBay affiliate feeds. Parser is an explicit no-op so enabling cannot fall back to generic output.

name: Mini Museum Meteorites
description: Shopify meteorite collection mixed with gifts, jewelry, complete collections, and educational specimen cards.
notes: Parser uses collection products.json with strict product_type, gift/jewelry/collection exclusions, and weight requirement. Disabled while mixed gift/specimen noise remains.

name: Fossil Realm Meteorite Collection
description: Shopify meteorite collection with product_type Meteorites, specimen details, prices, images, and provenance.
notes: Parser code remains available, but this source is disabled pending reliable full-fetch validation. The previous full scrape returned 0 listings due SSL EOF fetch failures despite passing smoke tests.

name: TOP Meteorite
description: Shopify-style rare meteorite dealer with active specimen products and some non-specimen merchandise risk.
notes: Parser code remains available, but this source is disabled pending reliable full-fetch validation. The previous full scrape returned 0 listings due SSL EOF fetch failures despite passing smoke tests.

name: The Space Shop Meteorites
description: Retail generic meteorite souvenir/gift products rather than named individual specimen inventory.
notes: Policy-blocked for normal scraping: current products are generic grams, lots, souvenirs, or jewelry. Parser is an explicit no-op so enabling cannot fall back to generic output.
